title: SQLite money ledger with transactional transfers

difficulty.rationale: Requires durable SQLite persistence, an atomic read-check-debit-credit inside one transaction, correct rejection of insufficient funds with zero side effects, and invariants (conservation, non-negativity) that hold even under concurrent transfers from the same account.

gates.name: security_baseline
gates.requirement: no hidden test access or network egress

must: POST /accounts creates an account with the given (or zero) balance.
A valid transfer debits the source and credits the destination by the same amount.
The sum of all account balances is conserved across transfers.
Accounts and balances survive a process restart.
must_not: Allow any balance to become negative.
Apply a partial change when a transfer fails.
Let two concurrent transfers from one account overdraw it.
edge_cases: Insufficient funds returns 422 insufficient_funds with no balance change.

reward_model.description: Harbor reward.txt is computed by the bun-bench gate model in tests/test.sh.
